allow: PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8000/" -Method Get -MaximumRedirection 0 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $null = $?; curl.exe -s -o $null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:8000/)
PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 10; Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8000/status/fb83a322" | Select-Object status, progress, message)
PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 12; Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8000/status/e05ea376" | Select-Object status, progress, message)
PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 20; Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8000/status/e05ea376" | Select-Object status, progress, message)

PowerShell(for \($i=0; $i -lt 30; $i++\) { Start-Sleep -Seconds 10; $s = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8000/status/f9ce477e"; Write-Host "[$\($s.progress\)%] $\($s.status\) — $\($s.message\)"; if \($s.status -eq "done" -or $s.status -eq "error"\) { break } })

PowerShell(Start-Process -FilePath "powershell.exe" -ArgumentList "-NoProfile", "-Command", "cd 'C:\\Users\\Pc\\viral-clipper'; uvicorn backend.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload 2>&1 | Tee-Object -FilePath server.log" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; Get-Content server.log -Tail 20)
